name: Raspberry Truffle Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt butter and chocolate chips over low heat.
2. Cool slightly.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs and brown sugar.
4. Dissolve coffee crystals in water; add to egg mixture with melted chocolate.
5. Mix well.
6. Combine baking powder and flour; stir into chocolate mixture.
7. Spread in a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30-35 minutes or until brownies are done.
9. Cool.
10. For filling, melt chocolate chips; cool.
11. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy.
12. Add confectioners' sugar and jam; stir in melted chocolate.
13. Spread over cooled brownies.
14. For glaze, melt chocolate chips and shortening.
15. Drizzle over filling.
16. Chill before cutting.
17. Store in the refrigerator.
